# Qlavo: Delhi-based GEO Agency — Generative Engine Optimization

Qlavo is a Delhi-based Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) agency that helps B2B brands get cited by ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, Gemini, and Copilot.

## Core Services
- [Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)](https://qlavo.in/ai-visibility)
- [AI Search Visibility Consulting](https://qlavo.in/geo-resources)
- [GEO Pricing & Cost Guide](https://qlavo.in/geo-pricing-cost-guide-2026)

## GEO Education & Guides
- [What is Generative Engine Optimization? (2026 Guide)](https://qlavo.in/what-is-generative-engine-optimization)
- [GEO vs SEO vs AEO: Key Differences](https://qlavo.in/geo-vs-seo-vs-aeo-differences)
- [Top 7 GEO Signals for B2B Brands](https://qlavo.in/top-7-geo-signals-2026)
- [7 Signals AI Engines Use to Know Your Brand Exists](https://qlavo.in/blog/7-signals-ai-engines-brand-exists)
- [GEO Statistics & Benchmarks 2026](https://qlavo.in/geo-statistics-2026)
- [GEO Agency Delhi & India](https://qlavo.in/geo-agency-delhi-india)
- [AI Glossary for Marketers](https://qlavo.in/ai-glossary)
